steps.title: Read the fitted line
steps.content: The question asks for the value predicted by the line of best fit, not the value of a nearby dot. At $x=25.5$, read vertically up to the fitted line.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The fitted line is a little above $8$ and below $8.5$ at $x=25.5$. The closest answer choice is $8.2$, so C is correct.
